creator: bf@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rodrigo Osorio from comment #6)

The patch for tor-devel is being handled in the separate Bug 202005 (the requirements for the tls library are versioned there, and the cpe additions are left intact -- they were only commented out for the brief period in which tor and tor-devel were on the same branch following a new release), so please don't use that portion.  I'll look into the other minor differences there.

Regards,
             b.f.
